reviews.review_description:
The idea is very nice. I have always loved Tetris so much. When I was a child, I saw the pieces come down and I arranged them with my mind ... ahaha. Well here the same thing happens in 3D! A small drawback was the music that after a while it was a bit annoying while.
I really appreciate this app and it is a never ending one so definitely got it !
update: ty !! now we can move pieces with both joystick !!

Tetris is one if the games my generation played all of the time, and now here we are playing again!  It moves at a pleasant speed, not so fast I can't follow. In some ways it's less stressful because if you get distracted you can turn the cube and drop a piece in the other side and continue with the side you were working on but then you have to figure that side out.  Can't tell you how it ends, haven't made it that far yet 😉 If you like tetris, this is definitely for you.

This is a good relaxing game. Yes, I know Tetris isn’t usually described as “relaxig” but this puzzle game version is to me relaxing due to the pace, which I feel gives you plenty of time to plan your move .  Sometimes I needed that time to figure it out, other times  I chose to make the drop faster because I had my move figured out. This is a great game that I would recommend to anyone that enjoyed Tetris.

I like Tetris but I haven’t seen it in 3D anywhere else. It was a little strange at first, but it is definitely a cool game mode. There is a learning curve to it no matter how good you are with regular Tetris so if you are up for the challenge - get the game :)

If you enjoy Tetris you’ll enjoy this game. As another reviewer noted there is a small learning curve but the game picks up easily after a few minutes of play. 

With the 3D aspect it’s like playing 4 Tetris games in 1. Once I figured out controls I found myself wanting to better my score. Replay value is there. 

Great game and happy I tried it!!

This takes Tetris to a whole new level. It did not disappoint.  The colors are great.  I appreciate the fact the blocks aren't coming down so fast to where it gets frustrating trying to keep up. I have a form of Muscular Dystrophy and it gets quite frustrating finding games I can play with my hands that don't require using a bunch of the buttons on both controllers.  I can play this game easily. On behalf of many, with disabilities, that struggle finding games we can actually play, a huge THANK YOU to the developer for creating this Tetrex 3D. It's relaxing and challenging at the same time.  There's only 2 suggestions I can think of.  I ended up muting the music because it really did start giving me a headache. I just played in silence,  but it would have been nice to have diff choices. Secondly, I figured it out easy enough, but some may like to have a quick set of instructions for the controllers.  Overall, I love this game and see myself spending a good bit of time playing.

developer_response.body: We are happy to hear your feedback and suggestions. We are working on music and instructions right now. See you on the next update!

reviews.review_title: If You Like Tetris, You'll Love TetTrex!
reviews.review_description: Everyone loved Tetris back in the day and now here we are doing it in VR!!! The game is fun and moves at a great pace, not too fast so you have time to figure out how to work the controls. Once you have those down, it’s fun to work the four panels in the cube, until finally you’re panicking that you’ve put that one block in the wrong way and duh!! You’re done! The graphics and colors are great and pleasant on the eye and for me, the only drawback was the music. it was ok at first, but after a little while, it drove me a little crazy and actually made me exit the game.  So for the lovely developer that asked us to try this.  The game is 100% great, you have a good one here. You should, in my opinion put in some fundamental “how to use” instructions for those newbies who have never played Tetris before and please give us an option to turn off that music, or at least put on a varied soundtrack. That same track over and over, is a bit much. Otherwise, a definite winner!

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your feedback. We will definitely consider your advice through next update!

reviews.review_description: I always enjoyed playing Tetris when i was younger and this was very similar except in 3D ! Fun !!

reviews.review_title: Exactly what I was looking for!!
reviews.review_description: I downloaded a well known Oculus tetris game and had to return it because it made me feel nauseous. I was so bummed, but then I stumbled on this game and I'm so glad I did! It's very comfortable to play. This is everything VR Tetris should be. The 3d twist is fun and brings a new element to my favorite classic. The controls are intuitive and easy to learn. All in all, I'm so glad I found this game and I would absolutely recommend it.
I love tetris and I think this is pretty cool. Its like a 4 sided tetris. I like it, its a new style and interesting
